action.reasoning: Observation: mIoU 0.4284 after 20 epochs, loss still declining. 5.85h left, 24 iters. Each epoch ~350s so 30 more epochs = ~3h. Analysis: Model still improving, should train longer. Can also improve with better augmentation and OHEM loss. Decision: Train 30 more epochs from current best checkpoint with some improvements.
